# Waveshare driver pinning manifest (JTN-701)
#
# Format: <driver_name> <commit_sha> <sha256>
# URL:    https://raw.githubusercontent.com/waveshareteam/e-Paper/<commit_sha>/RaspberryPi_JetsonNano/python/lib/waveshare_epd/<driver_name>
#
# Source repo: https://github.com/waveshareteam/e-Paper
# Pinned commit: 86aa9932f471a50157cf02fafadc2c1b4a965449 (2025 snapshot)
#
# To bump a pin: fetch the file at the new commit, compute sha256, update the row.
# install.sh refuses to install any driver whose sha256 does not match this manifest.
